calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Peterson appeared by zoom for and with Sylvia Stevens (Petitioner) by zoom.
Teri Susmann (Attorney who prepared the trust for Leena Hietanen) appeared by zoom.

The Court asked Counsel how the Court can confirm that the Schwab account is an asset of the trust. Mr. Peterson stated that the intent of the Trustor is what controls, that Sylvia found an application where Ms. Hietanen tried to put the account into a trust, that Ms. Hietanen was in close communication with someone from Schwab who disappeared, and that the application was signed and notarized which clearly shows the intent. Mr. Peterson also stated that this is the only asset of the trust. The Court stated that it understands what Mr. Peterson is saying, but it does not get them all the way there and that it does not have a clean line. Ms. Susmann stated that she met Ms. Hietanen about 30 years ago and they became friends, that about twenty years ago Leena asked her to assist her with her finances, that because there was turn in the economy the assets had to be removed from Merrill Lynch, that Leena wanted her United States assets to be part of her trust and that there was a clear reference that they were in the trust. Mr. Peterson asked the Court to look at article three and stated that it made it clear that the US assets be part of her trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is under submission. The Court informed Mr. Peterson that it is leaning towards denying the petition.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Continued To Mar-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Feb-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Peterson appeared by zoom for Sylvia Stevens (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it looked over the materials that were submitted in response to the Examiner's notes, that there is a Schwab account that was opened in September of 2012, that several other accounts (Ally, Aurora, Discover, Goldman Sachs) were transferred into that account and asked Mr. Peterson if he has any information on how those accounts were titled. Mr. Peterson stated that he believes those accounts were personally titled, that if necessary, he could subpoena those records from the banks and requested a two-month continuance to do so. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Asset is continued to February 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any supplements are to be filed ten days prior to the hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
